mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.asset_code, a.asset_name, a.category_id, c.category_name, c.category_code, a.specification, a.brand, a.purchase_date, a.original_value, a.useful_life, a.residual_rate, a.depreciation_method, a.accumulated_depreciation, a.net_value, a.department, a.keeper, a.location, a.status, a.qr_code, a.rfid_code, a.photo_url, a.remark, a.created_at, a.updated_at FROM asset a LEFT JOIN asset_category c ON c.id = a.category_id WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted = 0
